# terrible_azure_azcollection_azure_rm_cdnendpoint (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Name of the Azure CDN endpoint.
- `profile_name` (String) Name of the CDN profile where the endpoint attached to.
- `resource_group` (String) Name of a resource group where the Azure CDN endpoint exists or will be created.

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `content_types_to_compress` (String) List of content types on which compression applies. This value should be a valid MIME type.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of name→value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `is_compression_enabled` (Boolean) Indicates whether content compression is enabled on CDN.
- `is_http_allowed` (Boolean) Indicates whether HTTP traffic is allowed on the endpoint.
- `is_https_allowed` (Boolean) Indicates whether HTTPS traffic is allowed on the endpoint.
- `location` (String) Valid azure location. Defaults to location of the resource group.
- `origin_host_header` (String) The host header value sent to the origin with each request.
- `origin_path` (String) A directory path on the origin that CDN can use to retrieve content from. E.g. contoso.cloudapp.net/originpath.
- `origins` (String) Set of source of the content being delivered via CDN. Required when creating.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `purge` (Boolean) Use with *state=present* to purge the endpoint.
- `purge_content_paths` (String) Use with *state=present* and *purge=true* to specify content paths to be purged.
- `query_string_caching_behavior` (String) Defines how CDN caches requests that include query strings.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `started` (Boolean) Use with *state=present* to start the endpoint.
- `state` (String) Assert the state of the Azure CDN endpoint. Use `present` to create or update a Azure CDN endpoint and `absent` to delete it.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `host_name` (String) Host name of the CDN endpoint.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
